column1: 1 San Francisco-San Jose were combined for the circuity analysis used the same commute distance for cicuity
2 Los Angeles-Inland Empire and Baltimore-Washington used the same average commute distance, as they were grouped together in the NHTS data
3 Circuitry is from a sample of OD points with network distance matched to average commute distance with circuity weighted by matching network distance to each work commute distance interval
Circuity: Networks are Census Tiger 2008 2010 county-level shapefiles merged together, commute distances are from 2009 NHTS
Employment: 2008 MSA Business Patterns (NAICS - from Censtats)
Speeds - 2010 Urban Mobility Report, Exhibit A-8. Composite Freeway and Arterial (25% Freeway, 75% Arterial), converted to km/h
